revision.comment: create to test short descriptions to see if they start with a lower-case letter. Needs a lot more work, no doubt
revision.text: {{#if:<!--test first character for lower-case letter-->{{#invoke:string|find|{{Str left|{{{1|}}}|1}}|[a-z]|plain=false}}| <!--exclude whitelist-->{{#if:{{#invoke:String2|matchAny|c.|none|iMac|iTunes|source={{First word|{{{1|}}}}}}}| <!--do nothing; short description does not start with lower-case letter, or it starts with an allowed lower-case word --> |<!--apply category for lower-case short descriptions-->[[Category:Pages with lower-case short description]]}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>
